description: Canonical capability lifecycle registry. State machine defined in docs/architecture/capability-lifecycle.md.

capabilities.name: Qwen3.6-35B local inference (llama.cpp)
capabilities.description: Primary local LLM inference via llama.cpp at port 8080 with 12 GPU layers on Renoir APU.

evidence.rollback_procedure: Revert n-gpu-layers option in nix/modules/roles/ai-stack.nix and nixos-rebuild switch

capabilities.name: ROCm GPU acceleration for llama.cpp
capabilities.description: ROCm-accelerated llama.cpp for RDNA2/3 dGPU. Blocked on Renoir APU (no dGPU).

evidence.rollback_procedure: Set accelerationClass to blocked in hardware-capability-matrix.json

capabilities.blocked_reason: Hardware class 'renoir-apu' is incompatible with ROCm; requires RDNA2/3 discrete GPU
capabilities.unblock_condition: Hardware upgrade to RDNA2+ dGPU and rocm-promotion-gate.sh 6-stage pass

capabilities.name: hybrid-coordinator as canonical control plane
capabilities.description: The hybrid-coordinator (port 8003) is the canonical orchestration/control-plane service.

evidence.rollback_procedure: Not applicable — canonical status; degradation requires full architectural revision

capabilities.name: MemoryBroker write path
capabilities.description: Memory writes for new work should flow through MemoryBroker (POST /memory/facts and equivalents) rather than direct AIDB writes.

evidence.rollback_procedure: Use direct AIDB POST /documents if broker is unavailable; record exception in HANDOFF.md

capabilities.name: Front-door route alias resolver
capabilities.description: config/route-aliases.json + RouteAliasResolver: maps human-facing alias to canonical profile.

evidence.rollback_procedure: Revert config/route-aliases.json; fallback to _set_default_aliases() in RouteAliasResolver

capabilities.name: Intent classifier routing path (Phase 54)
capabilities.description: IntentClassifier routes queries via config/intent-routing-map.json when no explicit route field is present.

evidence.rollback_procedure: Disable IntentClassifier in http_server.py init; revert to alias-only routing

capabilities.name: WorkflowExecutor + workflow_checkpointer (canonical workflow runtime)
capabilities.description: WorkflowExecutor + workflow_checkpointer.py is the canonical workflow runtime (Phase 54). The UAG FSM is canonical for agent lifecycle only. Confirmed provisional in kernel declaration §open-decision-1.

evidence.rollback_procedure: Revert to pre-Phase-54 session handling; see kernel declaration open decision §1

capabilities.name: Local coding model (EDGE tier, unprovisioned)
capabilities.description: EDGE-tier local coding model via LLAMA_CPP_CODER_URL. Aspirational — hardware does not support a second concurrent model.
capabilities.blocked_reason: Hardware constraint: single llama.cpp instance; no second model URL configured
capabilities.unblock_condition: Provision LLAMA_CPP_CODER_URL with a second model instance or upgrade hardware

capabilities.name: Security systems domain (static analysis + findings knowledge)
capabilities.description: Unified security-analysis capability domain. Routes OWASP/policy queries to remote-reasoning; static scans (Semgrep, Bandit, Trivy) via local-tool-calling. Findings persisted to AIDB namespace security-findings. Dev shell: nix develop .#security. trivy in system profile post-rebuild.

evidence.rollback_procedure: Set state to blocked; disable security-systems-health check; remove security-analysis intent class from intent-routing-map.json if added

capabilities.name: Systems-software domain (NixOS module authoring + Nix static analysis + shell tooling)
capabilities.description: Capability domain for NixOS module development, Nix static analysis (statix/deadnix/alejandra), shell scripting, and deployment tooling. Dev shell: nix develop .#systems. shellcheck in system profile post-rebuild. Prefers local-tool-calling profile. AIDB namespace: nix-systems-patterns.

evidence.rollback_procedure: Set state to blocked; disable systems-software-health check; remove systems-software intent class from intent-routing-map.json if added

capabilities.name: Embedded hardware domain (HDL, firmware, cross-compile, JTAG/SWD)
capabilities.description: Capability domain for HDL design (Verilator/GHDL/Yosys), firmware authoring, ARM/RISC-V cross-compilation, device-tree authoring, and board support. Dev shell: nix develop .#embedded (defined; verified post-rebuild). Firmware write/JTAG ops are approval-gated. AIDB namespace: embedded-hardware-patterns.

evidence.rollback_procedure: Set state to blocked; disable embedded-hardware-health check; remove embedded-hardware intent class from intent-routing-map.json if added; remove .#embedded dev shell from flake.nix if added

capabilities.name: Mobile-web domain (Flutter, accessibility audits, MASVS, Playwright)
capabilities.description: Capability domain for web/mobile frontend development, WCAG 2.2 accessibility audits, OWASP MASVS mobile security analysis, Flutter/Android toolchain, browser automation (Playwright), and Lighthouse audits. Dev shell: nix develop .#mobile-web (defined; verified post-rebuild). Reverse engineering is approval-gated. AIDB namespace: mobile-web-patterns. Research: Gemini 2026-05-18.

evidence.rollback_procedure: Set state to blocked; disable mobile-web-health check; remove mobile-web intent class from intent-routing-map.json if added; remove .#mobile-web dev shell from flake.nix if added

capabilities.name: Scientific-research domain (reproducible pipelines, Snakemake, Jupyter, LaTeX, DOI ingestion)
capabilities.description: Capability domain for reproducible scientific computing: Snakemake pipelines, Jupyter notebooks, LaTeX/Pandoc report generation, DOI/citation ingestion, statistical methodology guardrails. Dev shell: nix develop .#scientific (defined; verified post-rebuild). DURC is forbidden. AIDB namespace: scientific-research-patterns. Research: Gemini 2026-05-18.

evidence.rollback_procedure: Set state to blocked; disable scientific-research-health check; remove scientific-research intent class from intent-routing-map.json if added; remove .#scientific dev shell from flake.nix if added

capabilities.name: GIS-systems domain (GDAL/OGR, PostGIS, GeoPandas, QGIS, CRS discipline)
capabilities.description: Capability domain for geospatial data transformation, spatial analysis, CRS validation, raster/tile generation, and Natural Earth/OSM data ingestion. Dev shell: nix develop .#gis (defined; verified post-rebuild). Canonical CRS: EPSG:4326. Critical infrastructure geolocation is approval-gated. AIDB namespace: gis-systems-patterns. Research: Gemini 2026-05-18.

evidence.rollback_procedure: Set state to blocked; disable gis-systems-health check; remove gis-systems intent class from intent-routing-map.json if added; remove .#gis dev shell from flake.nix if added
